text:
* Randy Bush <randy@psg.com> wrote:
> make: don't know how to make /usr/src/usr.bin/ee/ee.c. Stop

Can you give me the $FreeBSD$ tag of the Makefile? It should be (when
using SVN):

	$FreeBSD: head/usr.bin/ee/Makefile 192914 2009-05-27 17:27:03Z ed $
